summary: Markets exhibit bullish momentum in equities and Bitcoin amid tech rallies and short covering, though pre-FOMC caution introduces risk-off pullbacks in crypto. Oil faces downward pressure from eased geopolitical tensions, while gold and forex pairs await key central bank decisions. Overall sentiment leans positive for risk assets but tempered by upcoming data volatility.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: Bitcoin gearing up for small pullback to $6X,550 zone as a trap, then loading up longs for 72H bounce while retail panics.

signals.reason: Hunting scam wicks and order blocks on PENDLE for long entries to front-run market makers ahead of Bitcoin bounce.
